name: Chase
author: Tom Kruszewski (TSR, 1985/87); AGP port
description: Dice armies on a cylindrical 9x9 hex board: each die moves exactly its shown 'speed', wrapping left-right and ricocheting off top/bottom. Capture enemy dice, bump chains of your own, split dice through the central Chamber, and keep your on-board speeds totalling 25 — four or fewer dice and you lose. Tom Kruszewski, TSR 1985.
